query: Use datocms-setup-cli-profiles to add staging and production profiles to datocms.config.json and wire the per-profile token placeholders.
Please run datocms-setup-cli-profiles in this project. I want named DatoCMS CLI profiles but I do not need blueprint sync.
Invoke datocms-setup-cli-profiles and preserve the default profile while adding qa and release profiles.
Use datocms-setup-blueprint-sync so one migration history can roll out across multiple DatoCMS projects.
How do I configure and use DatoCMS CLI profiles from the command line?
